title: Fangoo 32 Pack 23cm Artificial Christmas Sprays Snowy Red Berry Picks Holly Red Berry Stems for Christmas Tree Fake Berries Branches Winter DIY Crafts Wedding Home Party Decor
features: Package Include: 32 Pcs artificial holly red berry picks, each measuring 23 cm in length.The stems are made from iron wire. The berries are made from foam. The branches can be bent perfect for holiday decorating and craftin

Snow Frosted Berries Design: Each christmas picks and sprays is accented with faux white snow, making the Christmas red berries look more beautiful and realistic, due to long term transportation,it’s normal if the snow effect falling off, please open it outdoors

Red Berries Christmas Decor: Christmas berries is adjustable and will not slip off easily when used.The frosted berry picks are bright, creating the festive and warm atmosphere for the coming holiday and winter

Material: The stems are made from iron wire. The berries are made from foam. The branches can be slightly bent and operate according to your needs.Each of the red holly berries is accented with faux white snow, with luster and realistic effect, full of rich winter atmosphere

Versatile Uses : The red berry stems ideal for Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, table arrangements, floral arrangement, photography props, decorate your dinning table, gift wrapping and other crafts. Also an ideal gift for your family and friends
description: Fangoo 32 Pack23cm Artificial Christmas Sprays Snowy Red Berry Picks Holly Red Berry Stems for Christmas Tree Fake Red Berries Branches Winter DIY Crafts Wedding Home Party Decor Feature： Transform your holiday décor with these enchanting artificial Christmas berry sprays from Fangoo. Each pack includes 32 pieces of lifelike red berry stems, measuring 23 centimetres in length, perfect for adding a festive touch to your seasonal arrangements. These snowy red berry picks bring the magical essence of winter indoors, ideal for enhancing Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, and other holiday decorations. The versatile stems can be easily shaped and arranged to create stunning DIY craft projects, wedding centrepieces, or party decorations. The realistic appearance of these holly berry branches adds warmth and charm to any space, making them a delightful addition to your winter holiday collection. Whether used individually or clustered together, these artificial berry sprays provide long-lasting beauty throughout the festive season without the maintenance required for fresh decorations. Specifications: Color: Sprays Snowy Red Material: Plastic Quantity: 32Pcs Use Cases: Christmas decorations, Handmade, Holiday gifts Notice: Please allow 1-5mm error due to manual measurement. Please make sure you do not mind before you bid. As the lighting effects, the color of objects maybe a little different from pictures.
